question: Which of the following best describes a way to safely transmit Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)?
canonical_answer: Paul verifies that the information is CUI, includes a CUI marking in the subject header, and digitally signs an e-mail containing CUI.

appears_in.title: Army Cyber Awareness Challenge 2023
appears_in.answer: Store it in a locked desk drawer after working hours.
